arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) identifying the Lambda layer version.

code_sha256.description: The SHA-256 hash of the layer version's source code.

compatible_architectures.description: A set of architectures that this layer version is compatible with.

compatible_runtimes.description: A set of runtimes that this layer version is compatible with.

created_date.description: The date and time when the layer version was created.

description.description: A brief description of the Lambda layer version.

id.description: The ID of the Lambda layer version.

layer_arn.description: The ARN of the Lambda layer without the version suffix.

license_info.description: The license information associated with the Lambda layer version.

signing_job_arn.description: The ARN of the signing job that signed the layer version.

signing_profile_version_arn.description: The ARN of the signing profile version used to sign the layer version.

source_code_hash.description: The hash of the layer version's source code.

source_code_size.description: The size of the layer version's source code in bytes.

version.description: The version number of the Lambda layer.
